text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doto, Opera O, Ayabe—are you all ready? We're
starting now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin the game of beach flags! Snatch up
the flags dotted around the shore! Ready, set...
go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

Meisho Doto lunges forward. Her core strength
has certainly improved. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this flag is none other than the flag of my
kingdom! I shall acquire it and have the world
learn of my power!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you have it... the glory of autumn is
mine!

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah!
Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wobble, wobble... Eep...

They quickly leave her in the dust... Unable to
stand firm in the competition, Doto fails to put
the pressure on them. She watches their two
silhouettes receding into the distance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I say, we spent today in a most productive
manner. Keep this up, and we can expect good
comings, my centurial troupe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: There is no "centurial troupe". Honestly...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If y-you could just... leave me and the tanuki over
in this corner here, that would be great...

text_block_list.name: Tanuki
text_block_list.text: Yip, yip...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You can save your theatrics. I'm winning this
autumn—whether you two stand in my way or not.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This autumn, you say? ...Ayabe, do you reserve
your resolve for that alone?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is true, the chrysanthemum season is nigh upon
us. However, there are other things that too
deserve your attention.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Deserve my attention? Like...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Must I elucidate it? Beyond autumn comes winter.
And beyond winter, a new spring.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. In that very season, we will have entered
a whole new act! It is the season of our united
front!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
United... front? Are you asking for us to work
together?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once the curtains close over the Classic Triple
Crown, we will become seniors, which only
means...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We will stand on the same liberated stage as the
generation that came before! Thus will begin the
era of generational conflict!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Against our predecessors, the Ultimate
Generation, we must stand victorious.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The Ultimate Generation... Runners like Special
Week and Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is so. Initially, I was planning to face them
alone. But my mind has changed since.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My destiny is far grander than I first imagined.
The sun's light is contended by countless stars on
high—and our generation yet bolsters their
number.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Don't you wish to leave a mark in this world? To
become permanent vestiges in the galaxy that is
racing history?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My intention is not to become reliant. But if I am
to put on my revue, the only way forward is
through a group production with a bounty of
stars!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, Doto, a grand opportunity has come our
way. Might we face our future together and fight
side by side?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to "fight together" with you.
However...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't lose, not to anyone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah, if a soliloquy is more your style, then so be
it. Speak enough, and it will rouse a revolution
from slumber.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you, Doto? Are you ready to play your
part and join the Friends of the ABC?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... I want to...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I want to get stronger... like Opera O, who I
respect so much... and Ayabe, who is so cool.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(But right now... I don't have a reason. I'm not
running for a departed sister, or to bring
everyone glimmering hope. I have nothing...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I will cheer you two on the best I can!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I suppose there is no shame in
devoting oneself to the chorus. Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...And that's what happened.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, now I understand. Trainer, it's safe to say
what Doto lacks is—

It's important to be strong both in body and
heart. Doto's never-give-up attitude is her
strength, but that shouldn't come at the expense
of confidence and grit.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, incoming divine message! I have a good idea
on my hands, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's find an activity that will bring you courage
during the summer festival.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Surviving a leap of faith may help you turn a new
leaf, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A leap of faith? So, something that will make me
brave like Opera O and Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: If that's the case... I'd like to give it a go, Trainer.

It might be worthwhile to have her try something
those two are likely to do. Which should I
choose?
choice_data_list: Make a speech on top of the festival tower.
Make a promise to your star.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Make a speech... So, I have to get atop the
wooden tower and say something? Okay, I'll do it.

Meisho Doto climbs up the wooden tower. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... I'm so high up, and there are so many
people... Okay, I have to say something cool...
like Opera O would.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Haaa ha ha ha! Look over yonder, my friends, at
those fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Because fireworks are... fireworks are!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: FIREWORKS ARE FIREWORKS!
Bang, bang!

Doto's big, mighty speech... ends up falling flat.
Regardless, her voice projects loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My own star... I see what you mean. It would be
nice if I had a star of my own, just like Ayabe.
Meisho Doto goes on a search for her fated star.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'd say, go big or go home. Forget the stars—you
should aim for the moon!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, n-no, I'm looking for something a little
smaller...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Look at that super shiny star over on
the right.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, see how there's another little one over near
it? It's a bit hard to see, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It feels relatable, somehow. You keep on going,
little star. Do your best, because I'll do my best
too.

Meisho Doto's choice comes as no surprise. But
from that tiny wish of hers, a burning ambition is
born.
